caption: The video appears to be a presentation or lecture on systems thinking and modeling, as indicated by the visual diagram displayed on the screen. The diagram is a complex network of interconnected nodes, each representing different concepts such as "awaken," "systems thinking," "models and methods," "developing models," "model sharing," "what people do," "buying & selling," "fight dish," "leadership," "how people think," "we have a problem," and "future of society." These nodes are linked with arrows, suggesting relationships and processes between them. A cursor moves across the screen, highlighting specific nodes, likely as the presenter explains their significance. In the top right corner, there is a small inset video of the presenter, who seems to be speaking and gesturing, providing verbal explanations that complement the visual content. The overall setting suggests an educational or professional context, possibly a webinar or online course.
